TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents an OpenType four-byte tag as a packed 32-bit unsigned integer.

Docs.param: The raw 32-bit tag value with the first character in the most-significant byte.

Docs.param: The first character of the tag (most-significant byte).
The second character of the tag.
The third character of the tag.
The fourth character of the tag (least-significant byte).

.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse(string tag) cil managed

Docs.param: The string to parse. Only the first four characters are used; shorter strings are right-padded with spaces.
Docs.returns: An built from the first four characters of , right-padded with spaces if the string is shorter than four characters. Returns a zero-valued tag when is or empty.
